title: Sen2ARD: Herramienta de procesamiento y generación de Datos Listos para el Análisis (ARD) de Sentinel-2 en Google Earth Engine
description: Sen2ARD is an open-source application based on Google Earth Engine (GEE) designed to automate the preprocessing, temporal analysis, and download of Analysis Ready Data (ARD) from the Sentinel-2 Surface Reflectance (SR) collection. This tool was developed within the framework of the research project PINV01-528, supported by CONACYT (Paraguay).
